summary: Bright performance of Brent’s vocals and Jerry’s trading licks on “Easy To Love You”, recording quality not specified
review: The lone fan review gushes over Brent Mydland’s lead vocal on “Easy To Love You” and the back‑and‑forth guitar interplay with Jerry Garcia, calling it a highlight of a beloved era. No technical details about the source or mix are given, so the recording quality remains unclear.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one 5‑star review, very positive about the performance but lacking any information on recording fidelity; rating leans toward strong show quality with unknown recording quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: No comments on sound clarity, mix, or source type in the review.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Review focuses solely on the highlighted moment; no commentary on overall set pacing.
